name: Flight 737 - MAXIMUM
short_description: Flight 737 - MAXIMUM; Designed to make flying a Passenger Plane easier and more fun for you to experience. You can experience your passion for piloting and aviation with our game.
detailed_description:
Flight 737 - MAXIMUM

This game is designed for those who do not want to fly a plane and deal with many complicated procedures, but want to be able to control everything in a simplified way.

Easily Use the 737 Passenger Aircraft and Feel Like a Pilot.

Total 5 Continents and 50 Different Airports

Autopilot feature with detailed controls

Functional Co-Pilot support

Flight plan and checklist that changes for each flight

FMC, Fuel data, ICAO, Leg Vectors, Flight number, Heading, IAS/Mach and Vertical Speed ​​details

Detailed lighting options inside and outside the cockpit

Wireless frequency and radio usage, communication with the tower, ground services and flight crew. Refueling, De-icing, Pushback Operations

Passenger and Cargo Transportation

Cabin Pressure, ALIGN and IRS Features

Navigation System

Realistic Audio and Visual Alerts for the Aircraft

Fun Flight Physics

Realistic Preparation, Taxiing, Takeoff, Cruise and Landing Scenario

Ability to Set Flight Duration, Weather Conditions and Your Own Crash Simulation if You Want.

Ability to Land from Any Airport to Any Airport

Active Air Traffic.

Post-Landing Procedures and the Task of Parking the Aircraft Correctly.

Design Your Own Aircraft Image and Use It in the Game.

Realistic and Full Flight Controller Support

Supports Many Gamepads in Addition to Keyboard and Mouse. Also Provides Full Support for Logitech Extreme 3D and Thrustmaster TCA Airbus Edition Controls

Fun Not Limited to Passenger Aircraft

The Game Offers Realistic Helicopter and Different Missions. There is also Retro Jet Fighter (Advanced) Fighter plane game and Forklift Operator Missions as Ground Services.
